factionAbilities.name: DATALINK PROTOCOLS
factionAbilities.effect: After you gain control of a planet, you may place 1 mech from your reinforcements on that planet.

factionAbilities.name: SUPERCHARGE
factionAbilities.effect: After you produce units, you may exhaust this card to place 1 mech from your reinforcements in the produced units' system.

versions.effect: Gain 1 technology that the Naaz‑Rokha player owns that is not a unit upgrade. Then, return this card to the Naaz‑Rokha player.

factionTechnologies.name: Nanoforge
factionTechnologies.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card and choose 1 planet you control; that planet gains +3 resources until the end of the round.

factionTechnologies.name: Supercharge
factionTechnologies.effect: After you produce units, you may place 1 mech from your reinforcements in the produced units' system.

abilities.name: Mech Deployment
abilities.effect: After you activate this system, you may place 1 mech from your reinforcements in this system.

mech.name: Rokha Sentinel
mech.deploy: When you gain control of a planet, you may place this unit on that planet.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías verdes pueden usarse como azules para prerrequisitos, y viceversa.

ability.name: Datalink Surge
ability.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to place 1 mech from your reinforcements on a planet you control.

agent.name: Rokha T’lak
agent.ability: When you produce units: You may exhaust this card to place 1 mech from your reinforcements in the produced units' system.

commander.name: Naazir K’tekk
commander.unlock: Have 3 mechs on the game board.
commander.ability: During production, you may produce 1 additional mech in a system that contains your space dock.

hero.name: The Alloy Ascendant
hero.ability: ACTION: Purge this card to place 1 mech from your reinforcements on each planet you control.
